name: alpaca-api-ts
description: TypeScript client for Alpaca Markets API generated from OpenAPI specification

scripts.generate:types: bunx openapi-typescript@7.13.0 https://docs.alpaca.markets/openapi/authx.yaml -o src/types/authx.ts && bunx openapi-typescript@7.13.0 https://docs.alpaca.markets/openapi/broker-api.json -o src/types/broker-api.ts && bunx openapi-typescript@7.13.0 https://docs.alpaca.markets/openapi/market-data-api.json -o src/types/market-data-api.ts && bunx openapi-typescript@7.13.0 https://docs.alpaca.markets/openapi/trading-api.json -o src/types/trading-api.ts
scripts.build: bun run generate && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node

author: Yago
